reference: Hi, my name is H. I am forty-seven years old and weigh eleven stone. I have had no illnesses or broken bones before. I have had my left big toe fused together and had two screws put in as well; this was on 9th November two thousand and thirteen and is still a bit sore. How long will it be before I can wear steel toe caps again for work? In other words, how long will I be off work? It was an accident at work, and I am getting full pay, so no worries there. Many thanks, H.
text: My name is Age. I am forty-seven years old and weigh eleven stone. I have had no illnesses, all broken bones before. I have had my left big toe fused together and had two screws put in as well. This was on ninth November two thousand and thirteen, and is still a bit sore. How long will it be before I can wear still toe caps again for work? In other words, how long will I be off work? It was an accident at work, and I am getting full page. So no worries there. Many thanks, Age.
